sentences.arabic: فِي الْمَاضِي، كَانَ النَّاسُ يَجْتَمِعُونَ لِلسَّمَاعِ إِلَى الْحَكَوَاتِيِّ.
sentences.translation: U prošlosti su se ljudi okupljali kako bi slušali pripovjedača.
sentences.translationEn: In the past, people used to gather to listen to the storyteller.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَحْكِي قِصَصًا عَنِ الْأَبْطَالِ وَالْمُغَامَرَاتِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: On bi pričao priče o herojima i drevnim avanturama.
sentences.translationEn: He would tell stories about heroes and ancient adventures.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمِعُ الْجَمِيعُ بِاهْتِمَامٍ كَبِيرٍ فِي الْمَقْهَى الشَّعْبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Svi su s velikim zanimanjem slušali u narodnoj kafani.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone listened with great interest in the traditional café.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْقِصَصُ تُعَلِّمُ الْأَطْفَالَ الْأَخْلَاقَ وَالْقِيَمَ الْحَمِيدَةَ.
sentences.translation: Ove priče uče djecu moralu i dobrim vrijednostima.
sentences.translationEn: These stories teach children morals and good values.

sentences.arabic: الْآنَ، نَجِدُ هَذِهِ الْحِكَايَاتِ فِي الْكُتُبِ وَالْمَكْتَبَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Sada ove priče nalazimo u knjigama i bibliotekama.
sentences.translationEn: Now, we find these tales in books and libraries.
